headline: Shelter continuity risks during wildfire evacuations
body: Context only: wildfire evacuation shelters should track medication access, smoke-sensitive groups, power-dependent equipment, infant supplies, mobility needs, and verified public updates.

headline: Medical needs require logistics review, not medical advice
body: Context only: medication lists, backup power for medical equipment, oxygen supply, and medical supplies are disaster preparedness concerns. RELAY does not recommend treatment or dosing.
